untranslatable_reason: Bullish Belt Hold pattern requires detection of: (1) primary uptrend context, (2) retracement phase identification, (3) specific candlestick morphology (long lower wick, small/no upper wick, bullish close), and (4) rise-retrace-rise sequence across 3+ bars. The allowed indicators cannot reliably identify multi-bar pattern sequences and retracement phases without explicit pattern recognition logic. The signal relies on visual/structural pattern detection beyond indicator-based rule composition.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture belt hold morphology (long lower_wick > upper_wick, bullish close > prev_close) and next-day confirmation (close > prev_close), but this lacks the essential context of: identifying the primary uptrend, detecting the retracement bottom, and confirming the rise-retrace-rise sequence. A proper implementation requires candlestick pattern recognition or multi-bar sequence detection not available in the indicator set.
